feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Event Mesh
feed.subtitle: SAP Event Mesh Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Need Help to extract value from message with groovy s...
entry.content:
Hello @Jeevitha_04 ,

I hope this solution aligns with your needs. I came across this suggestion while using ChatGPT.

Considering that your ID is always 16 digits long, I believe this solution might be suitable for your case. Could you please provide more details or clarify if this fits your requirements?

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

def Message processData(Message message) {
    //Body
    def body = message.getBody();
    def rootNode = new XmlSlurper().parseText(body);
    def payload = rootNode.Payload.text();
    def pattern = ~/(\d{16})/
    def matcher = (payload =~ pattern)
    if (matcher.find()) {
        def matchedDigits = matcher.group(1)
    } else {
        println "No match found"
    }
    def properties = message.getProperties();
    message.setProperty("newProperty", matcher.group());
    return message;
}

 

Best regards,

Burak

entry.title: Re: crystal report 2016
entry.content: Hi techii, you can get a trial version of 2016 here. Crystal Reports Server is also available as a trial. Any particular reason why you'd want 2016 over 2020?

entry.title: Procedimiento de Autorización por Cantidad y Usuario en Orden de Compra
entry.content:
Hola a todos,

La razón por la que escribo es la siguiente:

Tengo una solicitud en la que se necesita que cuando una Orden de Compra se encuentre dentro del rango de monto de 0.00 a 10,000.00 genere el proceso de autorización a "UsuarioManagerA" y cuando el rango del monto sea de 10,000.01 a + genere el proceso de autorización a "UsuarioManagerB".

¿Alguna idea de como hacerlo?

entry.title: Re: [BUG] blog shows up under untagged tag
entry.content: Hello Tuncay, no update other than that the issue is being worked on with high priority.

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/REPL fails when creating HU WT but /SCWM/ADHU i...
entry.content: Can you show your storage type configurations (both source and destination) as well as LOSC config?

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow with acocunt assignment category P - responsible person not found
entry.content: did you find a solution? i have same issue.

entry.title: Re: About the help portal variance of Extension Ledger, S...
entry.content:
Hi @a_montesdeoca,
Thank you very much for your thoughtful suggestion.
I understand that Public and Private products are completely different.
And I have also read the explanation you suggested about the ledger settings.  
The simple question I wanted to ask was:
The reason why the restrictions are not mentioned in the help portal of Private product about extension ledger is that they are intentionally not mentioned because they do not actually exist.
Could you tell me about this point?
Thank you and best regards,

entry.title: putaway by HU typens without a storage location indicator
entry.content:
Dear EWM colleagues,

I hope someone can give me a brief explanation of storage without a storage location indicator.  I have to set up the system so that a putaway strategy works solely on the basis of the HU types. I have always worked with the putaway tax code and am a little unsure about this. Does anyone have any experience with this and can give me a brief description? And is it even possible?
Many thanks for your support

entry.title: SAP B1 Cancel Asset Capitalization through DI-API
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am trying to cancel Asset Capitalization document through DI-API (VB.net)

Below are my code.

Dim oActivity As SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentService
oActivity = oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.ServiceTypes.AssetCapitalizationService)
'Dim oParam As SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentParams
Dim oParam = oActivity.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentServiceDataInterfaces.adsAssetDocumentParams)
oParam.Code = docno
oParam.CancellationOption = SAPbobsCOM.ClosingOptionEnum.coByOriginalDocumentDat
oActivity.Cancel(oParam)

 

I get the error at line Dim oParam = oActivity.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentServiceDataInterfaces.adsAssetDocumentParams)

 

Error saying Object reference not set to an instance of an object.

I think i am not calling the function correctly.

Please help me identify the issue.

 

Thanks in Advance.

Ibrahim

MB

entry.title: Re: SAP UI5 with Blazor
entry.content:
Hi Joerg,

This is an interesting starting point. It's a pity I stumbled upon a bit too late. I hope the work has not stopped or derailed.

Best Regards,

Salih

entry.title: Re: Printout from IW38/IW3D is square box with X inside
entry.content: Hello! May I ask what user print parameters to check? In terms of authorization or bug, no missing authorization or bug.

entry.title: Change log for user assignments in HANA DB
entry.content:
we have a request ,to extract the User roles assignements for certain time period in HANADB(ECP HANADB).
for instance,
 
users provisioned and de-provisioned during the period 01 April 2023 to till date to the below roles in HANA DB.

- AUDIT_ADMIN
- PUBLIC

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change log for user assignments in HANA DB
entry.content:
Do you want to see to/from which user, the roles and privileges are granted and revoked?
If yes, you may consider the HANA audit log. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Gateway ignored the filter pass by OData receiver...
entry.content: Thanks for the response. No credentials are correct.

entry.title: I am getting error, sent to printer, in queue
entry.content:
Hi,

    After I try to print a report in SAP i am getting "error, sent to printer, in queue".

please find attached screenshot. 

 

thanks

sateesh

entry.title: CR during runtime showing nothing
entry.content:
Hi all i have developed a desktop based software for my client, it uses VS2013 , CRRuntime64 bit 13_0_16 , and Win 11 as OS is installed in my computer , and my client have Win 11, i installed CRRuntime there but when i updated the software and installed again on client machine the crystal report show nothing just give message "please wait document is processing" , why this is happening, before updating software , i was working fine.

Else how i can download CRRuntime 13_0_16 64bit , i need download link so i can install on my client computer, previously it was working properly with 32bit , but now its also not working.

Kindly guide 

Kedar

entry.title: Re: Themes stop working once upgraded to SP18
entry.content:
It was due to flavor modification in higher version and moving to lower version. With service pack upgrade it got fix. Closing the thread. 

Thanks

RD

entry.title: Re: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same...
entry.content: Klaus, please let me know if you get a solution for that. Cheers, Cristina.
